abhidhńĀyaka (yikńĀ f.), abhidhńĀyin a.
1 Naming, expressing, denoting; eteŠĻ£ńĀmabhidhńĀyakńĀni klńębe syuŠł•  Sk. ; karŠĻ£ŇęŠł• kulyńĀbhidhńĀyinńę  Ak.  denotes, means, has the sense of.
2 Saying, speaking, telling; lakŠĻ£mńęmityabhidhńĀyini priyatame  Amaru. 23 ; vńĀcyńĀbhidhńĀyńę puruŠĻ£aŠł• pŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻ≠hamńĀŠĻÉsńĀda ucyate  Trik.
